'''''Star Wars: The Official Magazine'' 16''' was the 16th issue of the ''[[Star Wars: The Official Magazine]]''.

==Contents==
===Departments===
*[[Feel the Force]]
*New Hopes
*[[Star Wars Q&A|Q&A]]
*[[Second Trooper]]: [[Paul Blake]] & [[Maria De Aragon]]
*[[Comlink (department)|Comlink]]
*[[Jawa's Corner|Jawas' Corner]]

===Features===
*"[[Jake Lloyd: Child of the Force]]" {{C|retitlted "A Big Slice of Heaven...", from [[Star Wars Insider 39|''Star Wars Insider'' 39]]}}
*"[[When Artoo Met Wicket|Are You Artoo?]]" {{C|retitled "Are You Artoo?", from [[Star Wars Insider 39|''Star Wars Insider'' 39]]}}
*"Painting Shadows"
*:<small>[[Greg Hildebrandt|Greg]] & [[Tim Hildebrandt]], the two artists who painted the most famous ''Star Wars'' poster of all, unveil their latest project.</small>
*"[[Big Deal]]"
*:<small>An introduction to the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].</small>
*"The Fastest Hunk of Junk in the Galaxy"
*:<small>The low-down on the ''Millennium Falcon'', perhaps the most famous space craft from the ''Star Wars'' saga.</small>
*"Fully Booked" {{C|by [[Ian Spelling]]}}
*:<small>The second and final part of our interview with [[Allan Kausch]], [[Lucas Licensing]]'s continuity editor.</small>
*[[Anthony Daniels' Set Diary]]: Cast Iron
*:<small>[[Anthony Daniels]] remembers a time before his golden years.</small>
*[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Saga of Nomi Sunrider|''Tales of the Jedi'']]
*[[Star Wars: The Jabba Tape|''The Jabba Tape'']]
